title: prunus lusitanica
intro: Prunus lusitanica, also known as Portuguese laurel or cherry laurel, is a species of flowering evergreen shrub or small tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve congestion, due to the presence of glycosides such as amygdalin and prunasin. The health benefits of Prunus lusitanica include its use as an expectorant to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, and its potential to reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Prunus lusitanica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues and fever.
